completeness.notes: All 3 Linear issues completed. Sentry SDK integrated, exercise content populated (80/80), Build 289 on TestFlight.

quality.notes: Build succeeded with 20 non-blocking warnings (deprecations, Swift 6 concurrency). Sentry API compatibility fix applied. Exercise content verified 100% populated.

compliance.notes: All changes committed and pushed. Linear issues updated. Build deployed through standard pipeline.

efficiency.notes: Phase 1 agents ran in parallel. Build pipeline completed in ~143 sec. Came in under estimate (20 vs 25 min).

reusability.notes: Sentry integration follows existing conditional compilation pattern. Exercise migration is idempotent (WHERE NOT EXISTS guards).

outcomes.database_changes: 80/80 exercises populated with video_url, technique_cues, common_mistakes, safety_notes

next_steps.item: ACP-602: App Store Prep & Submission (screenshots, metadata, privacy policy)
ACP-600: Basic offline caching for today's session (post-MVP)
